_comment: Drop-in MCP server config for `fon-api-mcp`. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Continue, and any MCP-compatible client. Copy the `mcpServers` block into your client's config.

_paths.ClaudeCode: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) — or run `claude mcp add fon-api -- npx fon-api-mcp`
_paths.Continue: ~/.continue/config.yaml — see Continue docs for MCP wiring

_credentials: The four FON_* env vars above use BMF's published test credentials (tid=1000103u3032, benid=webserv99, pin=webserv99). They give read-only access to the FinanzOnline test environment. The Hersteller-ID must be registered with BMF (bmf-softwarehersteller@bmf.gv.at) — production submissions and real abfrage queries fail without one. See README.md `## Authentication` for details.
_tools_advertised: list_arts — enumerate the 36 BMF upload + 4 abfrage art codes plus typed-builder versions
describe_art — return a Draft-7 JSON Schema describing the body shape for a given art × version
build_xml — render a typed JSON body into BMF-conformant XML (Zod-validated)
validate_xml — round-trip an XML payload through the bundled BMF XSD (libxml2)
abfrage — query Lohnzettel / Sonderausgaben / Leitungsrechte / Hochwasser data already submitted to BMF
upload — submit an art-discriminated XML payload via the BMF fileupload service
_recommended_agent_workflow: 1. list_arts — see what's typed and at which versions
2. describe_art { art: 'U30', version: '07_2026' } — get the body's JSON Schema
3. Construct a body matching the schema
4. build_xml { art: 'U30', version: '07_2026', body } — get XML
5. validate_xml { art: 'U30', version: '07_2026', xml } — local XSD round-trip
6. upload { art: 'U30', uebermittlung: 'T', data: xml } — file (Test mode)
